publisher.name: economAIcs Group Ltd
publisher.registeredAddress: The Kiln, 2 Copenhagen Street, Worcester, WR1 2HB, England

system.name: The Transport Brain
system.category: Bid intelligence and audit-grade compliance for UK public transport
system.oneLine: An intelligence and compliance system for UK public transport operators that ensures they stay ahead of every competitor and trust every output their AI produces.

pillars.name: Intelligence
pillars.claim: Know more, so you stay ahead.
pillars.scope: Live tender monitoring before competitors see opportunities. Win probability scoring with transparent drivers. Competitor modelling by authority. Institutional memory codified. Post-award intelligence compounding into rebid advantage.

pillars.name: Compliance
pillars.claim: Control your AI, so you can trust its output.
pillars.scope: Every retrieval logged with source citation. Every score traceable. Every claim defensible. No hallucinations. No model training on client data. Sovereign data jurisdiction. Procurement Act 2023-aligned by design. Audit-grade by default.

system.boundary: UK public transport only. Bus, rail, ferry, transport technology, specialist advisory.

agents.name: The Brain
agents.role: Institutional Memory and Personalised Bid AI
agents.oneLine: A retrieval-augmented generation system built entirely from the client's own documents.
capabilities: Plain-English queries return source-cited answers with confidence scores
Bid DNA extraction — the language and evidence patterns of historical wins
Vector-indexed retrieval across the client's full document library
Versioned audit trail on every retrieval
compliance: No model training on client data

agents.name: The Scout
agents.oneLine: Continuous monitoring of Find a Tender and Contracts Finder for UK transport opportunities.
capabilities: Live OCDS API consumption from Find a Tender and Contracts Finder
Filtering against transport CPV codes 60000000–63700000
Scoring against client ICP profile
Prior Information Notice monitoring — surfaces opportunities 90+ days before formal release
Win-probability ranking before human review
outputs: Procurement Act 2023 alignment flags per tender

agents.name: The Analyst
agents.oneLine: Win probability scoring with transparent plain-English drivers. Not a black box.
capabilities: Zero to 100 win probability scoring with traceable drivers
Competitor modelling by authority, sector and contract value
Red team mode — argues the case against the bid before submission
Real-time in-flight scoring as the Ghostwriter drafts
inputs: Live tender notice (from Scout or manually loaded)

agents.name: The Ghostwriter
agents.oneLine: Drafts approximately 75% of the bid from the Brain's institutional knowledge.
capabilities: Criteria-aware first drafts structured against evaluation weighting
Compliance Guardian monitors throughout for Procurement Act 2023 alignment
Live source citation on every claim
Brain-linked retrieval as the draft develops
inputs: Tender response template and evaluation criteria
outputs: Draft responses to each evaluation criterion
Compliance Guardian flags for evaluator alignment

agents.name: The Partner
capabilities: Real-time scoring across all partner contributions
Contradiction detection during drafting (day 3, not day -2)
Full governance audit trail from day one
Multi-partner submission orchestration
inputs: Each partner's compliance and evidence base

agents.name: The Steward
agents.role: Post-Award Intelligence and Compounding Data Moat
agents.oneLine: Post-award intelligence where every other tool goes dark.
capabilities: Live KPI monitoring against bid commitments
Rebid window alerts 12–24 months before re-procurement
Continuous compliance monitoring through the contract lifecycle
Performance evidence base for rebid advantage
outputs: Rebid intelligence pack at re-procurement window

services.name: Bid Consulting
services.principle: Fixed fee per bid. No day rates.

services.name: UK Public Transport Tender Intelligence Report

foundingCohort.offer: 50% off platform retainer, locked for life
